formulas.name: 1. Calculation of Called-Up Share Capital
formulas.formula: Called-Up Share Capital = Number of Shares Issued × Rate of Call per Share
formulas.variables: Number of Shares Issued, Rate of Call per Share
formulas.notes: To find the amount of share capital called up from shareholders

formulas.name: 2. Calculation of Paid-Up Share Capital
formulas.formula: Paid-Up Share Capital = Number of Shares Issued × Amount Paid per Share
formulas.variables: Number of Shares Issued, Amount Paid per Share
formulas.notes: To find the amount of share capital actually received from shareholders

formulas.name: 3. Calculation of Reserve Share Capital (or Uncalled Share Capital)
formulas.formula: Reserve Share Capital = Authorized Share Capital - Called-Up Share Capital
formulas.variables: Authorized Share Capital, Called-Up Share Capital
formulas.notes: To find the remaining share capital that can be called up in the future

formulas.name: 4. Calculation of Calls-in-Arrear
formulas.formula: Calls-in-Arrear = Number of Shares not Fully Paid × Amount of Each Call not Paid
formulas.variables: Number of Shares not Fully Paid, Amount of Each Call not Paid
formulas.notes: To find the amount of share capital not received due to default by shareholders

formulas.name: 5. Calculation of Calls-in-Advance
formulas.formula: Calls-in-Advance = Number of Shares × Amount of Each Call Paid in Advance
formulas.variables: Number of Shares, Amount of Each Call Paid in Advance
formulas.notes: To find the excess amount of share capital received from shareholders

formulas.name: 6. Calculation of Share Application Money
formulas.formula: Share Application Money = Number of Shares Applied for × Application Money per Share
formulas.variables: Number of Shares Applied for, Application Money per Share
formulas.notes: To find the initial amount received from applicants for share allotment

formulas.name: 7. Calculation of Share Allotment Money
formulas.formula: Share Allotment Money = Number of Shares Allotted × Allotment Money per Share
formulas.variables: Number of Shares Allotted, Allotment Money per Share
formulas.notes: To find the amount received from shareholders upon allotment of shares

formulas.name: 8. Calculation of Share Capital on Forfeiture of Shares
formulas.formula: Share Capital on Forfeiture = Called-Up Share Capital - Forfeited Amount
formulas.notes: To adjust share capital when shares are forfeited due to non-payment

formulas.name: 9. Calculation of Reissue Price of Forfeited Shares
formulas.formula: Reissue Price = Face Value - Forfeited Amount + Discount (if any) or Premium (if any) per Share
formulas.variables: Face Value, Forfeited Amount, Discount or Premium per Share
formulas.notes: To determine the price at which forfeited shares can be reissued

formulas.name: 10. Calculation of Discount on Issue of Shares
formulas.formula: Discount on Issue = Nominal Value of Share - Issue Price per Share
formulas.variables: Nominal Value of Share, Issue Price per Share
formulas.notes: To calculate the discount allowed on the issue of shares
